canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>retrograde</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #0a0010; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, cx, cy;
let mouseX = 0.5, mouseY = 0.5;
let speed = 1;
let targetSpeed = 1;
let time = 0;
let audioStarted = false;
let audioCtx, oscillator, gainNode, lfo, lfoGain;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cx = W / 2;
  cy = H / 2;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Mouse tracking
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouseX = e.clientX / W;
  mouseY = e.clientY / H;
});

document.addEventListener('click', () => {
  targetSpeed = 4;
  setTimeout(() => targetSpeed = 1, 800);
  if (!audioStarted) initAudio();
});

document.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  targetSpeed = 4;
  setTimeout(() => targetSpeed = 1, 800);
  if (!audioStarted) initAudio();
});

function initAudio() {
  if (audioStarted) return;
  audioStarted = true;
  
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  
  // Deep bass drone
  oscillator = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  oscillator.type = 'sawtooth';
  oscillator.frequency.value = 55; // A1
  
  // LFO for wobble
  lfo = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  lfo.frequency.value = 0.3;
  lfoGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  lfoGain.gain.value = 5;
  lfo.connect(lfoGain);
  lfoGain.connect(oscillator.frequency);
  
  // Filter for that muffled synth sound
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filter.type = 'lowpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 200;
  filter.Q.value = 8;
  
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0.15;
  
  oscillator.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gainNode);
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  oscillator.start();
  lfo.start();
}

// Stars
const stars = [];
for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
  stars.push({
    x: Math.random() * 2 - 1,
    y: Math.random() * 0.5,
    z: Math.random() * 1000,
    size: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5
  });
}

// Mountain generation
function generateMountain() {
  const points = [];
  let y = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.1;
  for (let i = 0; i <= 20; i++) {
    const x = i / 20;
    if (i === 0 || i === 20) {
      points.push({ x, y: 0.5 });
    } else {
      y += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.08;
      y = Math.max(0.15, Math.min(0.45, y));
      points.push({ x, y });
    }
  }
  return points;
}

const mountains = [
  { points: generateMountain(), z: 800, color: '#1a0030' },
  { points: generateMountain(), z: 600, color: '#2a0848' },
  { points: generateMountain(), z: 400, color: '#3d1060' }
];

function draw() {
  // Smooth speed changes
  speed += (targetSpeed - speed) * 0.1;
  time += 0.016 * speed;
  
  // Camera tilt from mouse
  const tiltX = (mouseX - 0.5) * 0.3;
  const tiltY = (mouseY - 0.5) * 0.15;
  
  // Sky gradient
  const skyGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H * 0.6);
  skyGrad.addColorStop(0, '#0a0015');
  skyGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#1a0030');
  skyGrad.addColorStop(1, '#3d0066');
  ctx.fillStyle = skyGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Stars
  ctx.save();
  for (const star of stars) {
    star.z -= speed * 8;
    if (star.z < 1) {
      star.z = 1000;
      star.x = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
      star.y = Math.random() * 0.5;
    }
    
    const perspective = 500 / star.z;
    const sx = cx + (star.x + tiltX) * W * perspective;
    const sy = (H * 0.4) * (1 - star.y * perspective) + tiltY * 100;
    
    if (sy < H * 0.55 && sy > 0 && sx > 0 && sx < W) {
      const alpha = Math.min(1, (1000 - star.z) / 500);
      const twinkle = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(time * 3 + star.z);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 220, 255, ${alpha * twinkle})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx, sy, star.size * perspective * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }
  ctx.restore();
  
  // Sun
  const sunY = H * 0.48 + tiltY * 50;
  const sunX = cx + tiltX * 100;
  const sunRadius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.15;
  const pulse = 1 + 0.05 * Math.sin(time * 2);
  
  // Sun glow
  const glowGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(sunX, sunY, 0, sunX, sunY, sunRadius * 2.5 * pulse);
  glowGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.6)');
  glowGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(255, 50, 150, 0.3)');
  glowGrad.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(180, 0, 255, 0.1)');
  glowGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(100, 0, 200, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = glowGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Sun body with horizontal stripes
  ctx.save();
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(sunX, sunY, sunRadius * pulse, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.clip();
  
  const sunGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(sunX, sunY - sunRadius, sunX, sunY + sunRadius);
  sunGrad.addColorStop(0, '#ff71ce');
  sunGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#ff3399');
  sunGrad.addColorStop(1, '#b967ff');
  ctx.fillStyle = sunGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(sunX - sunRadius, sunY - sunRadius, sunRadius * 2, sunRadius * 2);
  
  // Stripe cutouts
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';
  for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
    const stripeY = sunY + (i - 3.5) * (sunRadius * 0.2);
    const stripeH = 3 + i * 1.5;
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,1)';
    ctx.fillRect(sunX - sunRadius, stripeY, sunRadius * 2, stripeH);
  }
  ctx.restore();
  
  // Mountains
  for (const mountain of mountains) {
    const perspective = 300 / mountain.z;
    ctx.beginPath();
    
    const baseY = H * 0.55 + tiltY * 30;
    
    for (let i = 0; i < mountain.points.length; i++) {
      const p = mountain.points[i];
      const mx = p.x * W;
      const my = baseY - (0.5 - p.y) * H * perspective * 1.5;
      
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(mx, my);
      else ctx.lineTo(mx, my);
    }
    ctx.lineTo(W, H);
    ctx.lineTo(0, H);
    ctx.closePath();
    
    ctx.fillStyle = mountain.color;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Mountain wireframe
    ctx.strokeStyle = mountain.z < 500 ? '#ff00ff44' : '#ff00ff22';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.beginPath();
    for (let i = 0; i < mountain.points.length; i++) {
      const p = mountain.points[i];
      const mx = p.x * W;
      const my = baseY - (0.5 - p.y) * H * perspective * 1.5;
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(mx, my);
      else ctx.lineTo(mx, my);
    }
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Ground plane
  const horizonY = H * 0.55 + tiltY * 30;
  const groundGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, horizonY, 0, H);
  groundGrad.addColorStop(0, '#1a0030');
  groundGrad.addColorStop(1, '#0a0015');
  ctx.fillStyle = groundGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, horizonY, W, H - horizonY);
  
  // Grid
  const gridOffset = (time * 100) % 100;
  const vanishY = horizonY;
  const vanishX = cx + tiltX * W * 0.5;
  
  // Horizontal lines
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ffff';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
    const t = (i * 50 + gridOffset) / 1000;
    const y = vanishY + (H - vanishY) * Math.pow(t, 0.7) * 2;
    
    if (y > vanishY && y < H) {
      const alpha = Math.min(1, (y - vanishY) / 100);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${alpha * 0.8})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, y);
      ctx.lineTo(W, y);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  
  // Vertical lines (perspective)
  const numLines = 30;
  for (let i = -numLines; i <= numLines; i++) {
    const xOffset = i * (W / numLines);
    const alpha = 1 - Math.abs(i) / numLines * 0.5;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${alpha * 0.6})`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(vanishX, vanishY);
    ctx.lineTo(vanishX + xOffset * 3, H);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Scanlines overlay
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03)';
  for (let y = 0; y < H; y += 3) {
    ctx.fillRect(0, y, W, 1);
  }
  
  // Chromatic aberration on edges
  const edgeGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W * 0.1, 0);
  edgeGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 0, 100, 0.1)');
  edgeGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 0, 100, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = edgeGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W * 0.15, H);
  
  const edgeGrad2 = ctx.createLinearGradient(W, 0, W * 0.9, 0);
  edgeGrad2.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.1)');
  edgeGrad2.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = edgeGrad2;
  ctx.fillRect(W * 0.85, 0, W * 0.15, H);
  
  // Update audio
  if (audioStarted && oscillator) {
    oscillator.frequency.value = 55 + speed * 10;
    gainNode.gain.value = 0.1 + speed * 0.05;
  }
  
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}

draw();
</script>
</body>
</html>
